response.justification: Despite a strong general software engineering background, the candidate lacks demonstrable C++ development experience on Windows and has no evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain expertise — both mandatory requirements for this role. Their work centers on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile systems, with only a brief, unrelated C++ project from 2015 for a bachelor’s thesis.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Strong open-source contributions and tooling expertise
Proven ability to deliver complex systems and lead technical initiatives
concerns: No professional C++ experience on Windows platform as required
No demonstrated exposure to fixed income, capital markets, or banking domains
SQL experience listed but not tied to SQL Server or Oracle in a financial context
